text.tspan: ABSOLUTE CARNAGE
@unhappychoice pours 56 commits into the repo stream, smashing 1,606 lines of code in one sprint
NOT A DRILL
@unhappychoice updates 22 dependencies across 10 repos, keeping CI humming like a well‑oiled machine
EXPERTS BAFFLED
@unhappychoice approves 49 PR reviews in a single week—no rejections, no back‑ports
DEVELOPING
@unhappychoice turns Dependabot into a disciplined army, landing 19 PRs with zero merge conflicts
UNPRECEDENTED
@unhappychoice’s commit storm on Thursday/Friday rewrites 1,606 lines, a record for a maintenance sprint
